title: sheqel #8255
definition:
1) shekel
    1a) the chief unit of weight or measure
        1a1) gold - 1/10000 of a talent and equal to 220 grains
        1a2) silver - 1/3000 of a talent and equal to 132 grains
        1a3) copper - 1/1500 of a talent and equal to 528 grains
